blended.narrative: Whiteface is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,977 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
